programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Steve Hofstetter: A Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Often called the "hardest working man in show-business", Steve Hofstetter covers everything from paper decapitations in plane crashes to seeing-eye children.

programme.title: Chad Thornsberry
programme.desc: Chad Thornsberry was born in St. Louis, MO. From an early age he learned his family was blessed, and blessed him with humor, quick wit, and a love of storytelling. Chad's unique comedic perspective awards audience the opportunity to laugh at the common occurrences in everyday life. Often referred to as a great writer, his straightforward style allows audiences to laugh with him and at him as they find the humor in themselves. With reflections on growing up in a trailer park and observations as an English teacher, Chad's satiric insights look at the pitfalls that make us human. With smart humor and a conversational style, Chad has delighted audiences from the trailer park, throughout the Midwest, and from coast to coast.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Chris Schlichting: Catch and Dress a Squirrel
programme.desc: Chris Schlichting, an Iowan with every bone in his body still intact, comes with a few crucial warnings. Beware of birthday wishes, day raccoons, and the spelling on all hand written love letters.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: San Diego native Jesse Egan jokes about hitting on women in a smart car, hippie drive-bys, and the gluten free craze.

programme.title: Andy Beningo
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business. Performing his clever, "every man" material has led to some 2,700 career performances. Along the way, he has appeared on AXS Gotham Comedy Live, as a final four finalist on CMT's Next Big Comic, and on the Bob and Tom radio show. Beningo's new CD regularly plays on Laugh USA on XM Sirius Radio. He's been hailed for his clean comedy, and was named one of the 40 Best Up and Coming Comedians in the country. He was also named "Best Comedian" by both the Detroit Metro Times and Detroit Hour magazine.

programme.title: James Johann
programme.desc: James' childhood upbringing was significantly influenced by country music, countless bad hair cuts, and Catholic school. In 1991, James began his stand-up career in Kansas City. Today, James is a long-time veteran of the stand-up comedy circuit, performing at clubs across the country. His self-deprecating sense of humor and high energy style come together to create a unique onstage persona. James relies more on his brain than the profane and his comedy is a truthful and hilarious reflection of life as he sees it.

programme.title: Gary Owen Breakin' Out the Park
programme.desc: In this brutally honest stand-up performance Owen confesses his hilarious history of growing up in and around trailer parks.

programme.title: Gallagher Overboard
programme.desc: Featuring Gallagher's most elaborate staging, and imaginative use of props, he really did go Overboard when he did this one.

programme.title: Gallagher An Uncensored Evening
programme.desc: Join Gallagher for his 1st TV special from 1980, complete with candy bar treats and a Sledge-O-Matic routine for which the audience was ill prepared.

programme.title: Jasmine Ellis: Nobody's Queen
programme.desc: Jasmine Ellis shares her unapologetically hilarious takes on being a newly married millennial.

programme.title: Jay Stevens: Life Is Hilarious
programme.desc: Growing up, Jay Stevens was known as a hilarious outgoing character by friends, family, colleagues and those he would meet on a first encounter.

programme.title: Nikki Carr: I Wish These Were Jokes
programme.desc: Nikki Carr is 57 and feeling great. After all, she's got the career where all you have to do is be yourself and have a good time.

programme.title: Tim Wilkins: Password Protected
programme.desc: Tim is a 20-year veteran stand-up comedian, TV and radio personality, speaker and writer, who has performed on stages around the world.

programme.title: Bone Hampton: It Is What It Is
programme.desc: As down home as collards and cornbread, and as funny as a possum in a petticoat, Bone Hampton is a master at making audiences feel like family.

programme.title: Kendra Cunningham: On My Best Behavior
programme.desc: Kendra Cunningham has been named as a comic to watch by Time Out New York and has been compared to Groucho Marx and Mae West by the UK's Chortle.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Join former MST3K stars Mike, Kevin, and Bill for this classic 80s tale of snobs vs. slobs who are mutants who are zombies, Mutant! Starring cult legend Wings Hauser!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.sub-title: Shorts: William From Georgia to Harlem
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short that follows a young country boy as he tries to re-adjust to living in his new home in the big city. Join Mike, Kevin and Bill as they take a trip with William From Georgia to Harlem!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to Dinosaurus, a vintage 60s monster flick, complete with a caveman and drunk-looking stop motion dinosaurs. Travel back in time with Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Dinosaurus!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Bela Lugosi! An ugly robot! The power of invisibility! A military intelligence officer romancing an ambitious reporter! All of these exciting-sounding elements are undeniably contained within the runtime of The Phantom Creeps! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this driving scare film. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Borrowed Power!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this budget version of The Wizard of Oz! Join Mike, Kevin, Bill, and surprise guest Dr Erotico for The Wonderful Land of Oz!

programme.title: Stonewall (2015)
programme.desc: Passions and politics make a volatile mix in this dynamic drama directed by Roland Emmerich that follows the events that led to the birth of the modern Gay Rights movement.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: Hit man Richard Kuklinski (Michael Shannon) earns a well-deserved reputation as a cold-blooded killer but manages to keep his violent profession a secret from his wife (Winona Ryder) and children for years.

programme.title: The President's Man
programme.desc: A U.S. president must find a replacement for a mission.

programme.title: The President's Man: A Line in The Sand
programme.desc: A counterterrorism specialist is suspected of planning to set off a nuclear device.

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: The night he retires as a Nevada sheriff, Jerry Black (Nicholson) pledges to the mother of a murdered girl that he will find the killer. Jerry doesn't believe the police arrested the right man he discovers this is the third incident in the area in the recent past with victims young, blond, pretty, and small for their age.

programme.title: The Illusionist
programme.desc: An Oscar-nominated drama set in early 1900s Vienna. An illusionist (Edward Norton, "Fight Club") uses his powers to charm an engaged aristocrat (Jessica Biel, "Next"). With Rufus Sewell and Paul Giamatti.

programme.title: Stonewall (2015)
programme.desc: Passions and politics make a volatile mix in this dynamic drama directed by Roland Emmerich that follows the events that led to the birth of the modern Gay Rights movement.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: Hit man Richard Kuklinski (Michael Shannon) earns a well-deserved reputation as a cold-blooded killer but manages to keep his violent profession a secret from his wife (Winona Ryder) and children for years.

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Robert De Niro and John Travolta star as two veterans hunting each other in this action thriller.

programme.title: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: A private eye shadows a female serial killer of men all over the U.S. without her knowing as he, strangely enough, occasionally acts as her guardian angel.

programme.title: Frank and Jesse
programme.desc: Western starring Rob Lowe and Bill Paxton, based on the lives of Frank and Jesse James. After the Civil War Frank and Jesse return to their family's farm. When their younger brother is murdered they embark on a mission for revenge.

programme.title: Sweet Country
programme.desc: Australian western set on the Northern Territory frontier in the 1920s, where justice itself is put on trial when an aged Aboriginal farmhand shoots a white man in self defense and goes on the run as posse gathers to hunt him down. Festival favorite of Venice, Toronto, and Sundance.

programme.title: Love, Bubbles & Crystal Cove
programme.desc: The movie follows main character Skye and her bath and body business Lather and Luxury. Her childhood sweetheart arrives in town to help her improve it and sparks fly.

programme.title: Flowers & Honey
programme.desc: LA city florist, Sarah Foster, inherits her great aunt's farmland and moves to Green Valley to turn the old oat crops into a field of Hawaiian Hibiscus blooms for her shop. However, she ends up going head to head with the handsome and hot-headed Hank, who's apiary business is put on the line when the hibiscus flowers turn his honey red!

programme.title: Autumn Stables
programme.desc: After her husband's death, Autumn sells her ranch to Jake expecting nothing will change however, Jake has ulterior motives with the land and her heart.

programme.title: A Wedding to Remember
programme.desc: On opposite sides of a development project, Olivia and Brian are surprised to find they are the Maid of Honor and Best Man at the same wedding. They have to put their feelings aside to save their best friends' wedding - which may turn out to be their own as well.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley is brilliant at organizing other people's engagements. When designing her most important proposal yet, will the man who could jeopardize it all be her very own prince charming?

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Cassie is surprised with adventurous outings by both Sam and John.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. After a great date with Sam, Cassie feels spellbound by their connection.

programme.title: My Gal Sunday
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A newlywed couple must prove their crime-solving prowess.

programme.title: Along Came a Nanny
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Detective Mike Logan takes on a special undercover assignment as a nanny.

programme.title: So You Said Yes
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A bridal shop owner clashes with the a competing business's owner.

programme.title: I Do, I Do, I Do
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. An architect relives her disastrous wedding day over and over.

programme.title: Her Husband's Betrayal
programme.desc: Cathy Coulter is looking forward to a bright future.

programme.title: A Woman Hunted
programme.desc: A young mother, just out of drug rehabilitation.

programme.title: Obsessed
programme.desc: Medical writer Ellena Roberts is arrested for harassing Dr. David Stillman.

programme.title: Her Husband's Betrayal
programme.desc: Cathy Coulter is looking forward to a bright future.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A bear finds himself lost at Paddington Station, where he meets a family who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: The Great Gilly Hopkins
programme.desc: A feisty foster kid's outrageous scheme to be reunited with her birth mother has unintended consequences.

programme.title: Barefoot
programme.desc: A rebellious young man fakes a relationship in order to impress his demanding family at his brother's wedding.

programme.title: How to Be a Latin Lover
programme.desc: A man who made a career of seducing rich older women must move in with his estranged sister.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: ParaNorman
programme.desc: Norman Babcock finds his paranormal abilities pushed to their limits to take on zombies and ghosts, and save his town from a centuries-old curse.

programme.title: The Boxtrolls
programme.desc: When evil Archibald Snatcher decides to capture the Boxtrolls – lovable, box-wearing creatures – it's up to Eggs and his friend Winnie to same them.

programme.title: The Duchess
programme.desc: Chronicles the life of 18th century aristrocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, an ancestor of Princess Di.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life
programme.desc: Jean moves in with her father in-law. Through time, they learn to forgive each other and heal old wounds.

programme.title: Allied
programme.desc: A Canadian intelligence officer in North Africa encounters a French Resistance fighter on a deadly mission

programme.title: The Kite Runner
programme.desc: After spending years in California, Amir returns to his homeland in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: A public defender pokes into places she shouldn't while trying to exonerate an innocent man accused of murder. Edited for TV

programme.title: Baby Blue Marine
programme.desc: A marine, living under a false identity, becomes a true hero by performing acts of bravery.

programme.title: Courage And The Passion
programme.desc: The story of test pilots, the women in their lives and the anxieties of personnel at an air force testing facility.

programme.title: Every Time We Say Goodbye
programme.desc: Set during WW II, a young couple struggles when the girl's parents refuse to let her marry the man she loves.

programme.title: The Bedford Incident
programme.desc: The captain of a newly launched U.S. Destroyer is obsessed with hunting down a particular Soviet submarine regardless of the great risks involved.

programme.title: Our Man In Havana
programme.desc: A vacuum cleaner salesman is recruited by the British secret service to act as a spy in Havana.

programme.title: It Had To Be You
programme.desc: Ginger Rogers stars in this fanciful, screwball comedy as a young woman who has left three grooms standing at the altar...and is about to do it again! Cornel Wilde co-stars as the gentleman who tempts her away from the altar and then succeeds in marrying her himself.

programme.title: A Night To Remember
programme.desc: Mystery writer Jeff Troy (Brian Aherne) and his lovely wife Nancy (Loretta Young) move into a Greenwich Village basement apartment in order to gather material for Jeff's new book.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

programme.title: That Touch of Mink
programme.desc: Love arrives with a splash when a handsome and eligible tycoon and a beautiful working woman meet over a curbside mud puddle. He's enchanted by her small town ways, she's captivated by his romantic, debonair manner.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard
programme.desc: Intense, enthralling, and unforgettable, Sunset Boulevard stars Gloria Swanson as Norma Desmond, a faded silent-movie star, and William Holden as Joe Gillis, a down-on-his-luck screenwriter whom she enlists to help her make her triumphant return.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: After Show
programme.desc: Is Toy Story 4 Pixar's Best Yet? Plus, why The Lion King has such a low Tomatometer score.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: It's Summer time! We're counting down the best Summer movies.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: We're counting down the best movies of the 1990s.

programme.title: Vs.
programme.desc: British titans Idris Elba and Daniel Kaluuya face-off on this episode of Versus.

programme.title: Vs.
programme.desc: Two fan-favorite production companies, A24 and Blumhouse, face-off in this episode of Versus.

programme.title: Trailers Reloaded
programme.desc: A look back at cinema's finest summer getaways.

programme.title: Trailer Trivia
programme.desc: Celebrate PRIDE by checking out these fun facts from our favorite LGBTQ+ tv shows.

programme.title: RT Essentials
programme.desc: We breakdown the movies that had the largest divide between critics and the audience.

programme.title: Come September
programme.desc: A New York businessman visits his Italian villa to relax with his girlfriend, but his home has become a hotel.

programme.title: august at twenty-two
programme.desc: Cal, a floundering New York actress, accidentally falls in love with her best friend's girlfriend.

programme.title: All About Sex
programme.desc: All About Sex follows the lives of three mid-20's friends, Casey, Morgan and Sage, each caught in the grip of a quarter-life crisis as they meander through the messy, embarrassing and confusing pitfalls that come with “adulting”.

programme.title: 10e
programme.desc: After a 17-year old girl's reputation takes a hit at school before the prom, her single father tries to rebuild their relationship by acting as more of a friend, when what she really needs is a father.

programme.title: Almost Friends
programme.desc: Once a promising chef, now unmotivated and living at home with mom, Charlie gets by as a movie theatre assistant manager. But when he meets his dream girl and his estranged father returns, will he finally be able to find a path forward

programme.title: Sweetness In The Belly
programme.desc: A moving story of Lilly, a child abandoned in Africa. Forced to flee ethiopia for england when civil war breaks, she befriends Amina, an ethiopian refugee who has fled the same war. They begin a mission to reunite people with their families.

programme.title: Love on Retreat
programme.desc: Sparks fly between Jenny and Nate at a corporate retreat, despite him being her boss's brother.

programme.title: A Royal Recipe for Love
programme.desc: When Emma is hired to bake for a royal cake, she finds herself at odds with a Prince.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: Tiffany and her frenemy compete over wedding bookings, despite her not having a real fiancé.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a garden with a plant-loving country boy to appease her boss.

programme.title: The Christmas Wife
programme.desc: A widower (Jason Robards) not wanting to face his first Christmas alone responds to an ad for social introductions and enlists the services of forlorn escort, Iris (Julie Harris) to be his “Christmas Wife”. A holiday classic!

programme.title: An Old Fashioned Thanksgiving
programme.desc: On a poor New Hampshire farm in 1860's America, family ties are tested during the Thanksgiving holiday when a wealthy, bitter woman pays an unexpected visit to her estranged daughter and grandchildren.

programme.title: A Christmas Hero
programme.desc: When a young disillusioned war vet home from Afghanistan sees nothing good in his life, a visit by his guardian angel shows him that his life really did make a difference.

programme.title: Hats Off To Christmas!
programme.desc: After ten years, Mia hopes for a promotion to upper management in the store when the boss/owner wants to see her. But he wants her to show his son, Nick, the ropes. Mia's a widowed mom and Nick is single.

programme.title: Life Risking Romance
programme.desc: What would you do if the love of your life were a serial killer? A crime novel writer Han Jane has become a nuisance to her neighbors by often mistaking her neighbors as suspects of crime. One day, she hears someone's scream from upstairs and decides that the person upstairs is the serial killer on loose. While Jane keeps pursuing the serial killer with help of Jason and her childhood friend, she witnesses a shocking scene that changes everything she had believed so far.

programme.title: Detective K: Secret of the lost island
programme.desc: In 1795, fake silver floods the economy. Kim Min investigates the criminal ring behind the perilous scheme.

programme.title: Blue Swallow
programme.desc: Kyung-won has been dreaming of becoming a pilot. All she wants to do is flying back home with her plane.

programme.title: Welcome To The Guesthouse
programme.desc: Jun-geun keeps failing at job seeking in cold job market. One day, He finds hope through surfing by the beach.

programme.title: Dangerous Men
programme.desc: Emmanuel is an assassin who goes against the order of his contractor X and refuses to carry out a hit placed on Senator Kingston. Emmanuel is forced to take turn a homeless man into the perfect killer. The deadly duo forms an alliance with Kingston and go after X. This leads to the ultimate showdown between the assassin and the head of the organization. Get ready for non-stop action, masterful fight sequences.

programme.title: Despise Not, My Youth
programme.desc: The most popular guy in school, Jason, is bullying his classmates, and living a life of mischief, until one day after getting high, he hears the voice of God commanding him to change his ways, or face going to hell.

programme.title: Dollhouse
programme.desc: Ella ends up encountering a strange man that is infatuated with young black women, while on the job. The man happens to be the infamous Dollhouse Killer, who turns his victims into perfect dolls for his pleasure.

programme.title: Domestic Warfare
programme.desc: When a generational curse catches up to Sisley, she must try to overcome all the obstacles throughout her life and learn to forgive or suffer mentally for all eternity.

programme.title: The Matthew Shepard Story
programme.desc: In this dramatization of an actual event, young Matthew Shepard (Shane Meier) is mercilessly slain by a pair of men who targeted their victim because of his homosexuality. Capital punishment looming, the killers' fate lies in the hands of Matthew's parents, Judy (Stockard Channing) and Dennis (Sam Waterston). As the grieving couple attempts to make the choice that will best serve Matthew's memory, they recount his rocky adolescence, lifelong struggle for acceptance and personal views on life.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: Concrete Canyons
programme.desc: In this thrilling crime drama, a sheriff searches for his son who is accused of murder and on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Miseducation of Cameron Post
programme.desc: In 1993 after teenage Cameron is caught in the backseat of a car with the prom queen, she is sent away to a treatment center in a remote area called God's Promise. While she is being subjected to questionable gay conversion therapies, she bonds with some fellow residents as they pretend to go along with the process while waiting to be released.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: Metro
programme.desc: Moscow's underground train system sees terror after a collapsed tunnel causes massive flooding. Subtitled.

programme.title: Earthstorm
programme.desc: After a massive asteroid crashes into the moon, it's discovered that the moon's structure is now entirely unstable, threatening all life on Earth.

programme.title: Streets of Blood
programme.desc: While investigating the "accidental" death of his partner, a New Orleans police officer plunges into the city's criminal underworld. Starring Val Kilmer ("The Doors") and 50 Cent.

programme.title: Double Identity
programme.desc: An American doctor (Val Kilmer) takes a detour in life and becomes a victim of mistaken identity when he helps a mysterious woman (Izabella Miko) escape from her would-be assailant.

programme.title: The Moody Blues
programme.desc: Celebrating the 50th anniversary of their landmark album, Days of Future Passed, The Moody Blues took to the road to perform the entire LP live. This film, capturing an electric evening at The Sony Centre, Toronto, where the band was joined on stage by a full orchestra for the first time ever, is the definitive performance of this seminal album. This spectacle of a show features stunning visuals and a unique narration performed by Jeremy Irons, transporting the audience and viewer to the psychedelic dream world of their classic record. Including the iconic hits Nights In White Satin and Tuesday Afternoon, this film truly pays homage to five decades of musical mastery. In this impressive yet intimate auditorium, The Moody Blues have never sounded better.

programme.title: Lana Del Rey
programme.desc: Born to Die is the second album by singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, and the first to be officially released on January 27, 2012 and that would lead to global success In countries such as the United Kingdom the album was the best selling of that year, that recognition made her a guest of honor in one of the most popular London festivals iTunes Festival, where she would open the awe of all attendees on the night of September 25 2012 at the Roundhouse in the city of London.

programme.title: Carrie Underwood
programme.desc: Watch Carrie Underwood performing live at the Apple Music Festival. What a unique concert experience, not only for the fans at the Roundhouse, but also for fans across the globe!

programme.title: Avril Lavigne
programme.desc: The Canadian Avril Lavigne enchanted the public in 2007 at her show in Calgary (Canada), in which she released the album “The Best Damn Thing”, which sold, that same year, more than 6 million copies worldwide. The pop singer rocked the audience to the sound of “Girlfriend” as well as other great hits like “Complicated” and “I'm With You”. DVD Tracks:01- Girlfriend02- I Can Do Better03- Sk8er Boi04- My Happy Ending05- Losing Grip06- Runaway07- Don't Tell Me08- I'm With You09- Everything Back But You10- The Best Damn Thing11- Complicated12- I Don't Have To Try13- He Wasn't14- When You're Gone15- Girlfriend ( Video clip)

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Vítor le organiza una fiesta de quince años a su mamá porque nunca pudo celebrarlos y le pide a todos sus compañeros que lo apoyen siendo padrinos de su madre.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor deciden cambiar su apariencia drásticamente para conquistar mujeres, pero optar por volver a su vida normal después de ver que el plan no funciona.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alicia le hace brujería a Pascual. Roberta y Diego preparan sus campañas para la presidencia. Lola descubre a José y Teo besándose y piensa que están engañando a Lupita. Mia tiene un mal presentimiento sobre una carta dejada por Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego pide a Iñaki que se infiltre en el equipo de campaña de Roberta. Los secuestradores se ponen en contacto con Mia para pedir un rescate por Miguel. Lupita se distancia de Leo e intenta arreglar las cosas con Lola, pero ésta la desprecia.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Andrea and Wayne see Real Potential
programme.desc: As this newlywed's family starts to grow it's time for their home to do the same. Andrea and Wayne are hunting for charm and character that for one means turnkey and for the other means DIY. Sarah shows them the potential of three houses that are livable, but somewhat needy. Once Andrea and Wayne buy, Sarah renovates the room they can't figure out, setting them on course for future renos!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Truc and Eric see Real Potential
programme.desc: Judging by Truc's massive shoe collection and Eric's DJ gear, these two have long grown out of their tiny city apartment. Their failed home to date search has been driven solely by charm and character. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes that tick these boxes with extra storage to boot. Once Truc and Eric buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that allows them to live larger than ever!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Jasmine and Kevin see Real Potential
programme.desc: They first thought buying a home would be easy. Seven months later Jasmine and Kevin are still living in a hotel room, undecided whether they should live downtown or in the suburbs. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes, betting that she can help them bridge their location tug of war. Once Jasmine and Kevin buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that puts a lasting polish on a diamond in the rough!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Christa and Mike see Real Potential
programme.desc: How's this for pressure? Christa and Mike have 30-days to buy, seven-week old baby in tow! Sarah shows these two the potential of three suburban homes, each with fewer stairs than their current townhouse. Good thing, as Mike breaks his leg part way through the search. Once Christa and Mike buy, Sarah tears apart and renovates their deal breaker room, giving them a treat they so deserve!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Evette and Jason see Real Potential
programme.desc: After two-years of renting in the suburbs Evette and Jason are ready to commit. The issue: while the houses they've been viewing hare new, they're surprisingly not very well cared for. Sarah shows them the potential of three suburban homes, trying to mitigate the quirks they've seen time and again. Once Evette and Jason buy, Sarah wrangles sense and style into the one room in their new home that remains a puzzle!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Vanessa and Troy see Real Potential
programme.desc: Vanessa and Troy are blending their two condos into one home they can finally call their own. Trouble is, when viewing homes Vanessa can't help but be swayed by the homeowners' taste to make an informed decision. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes, helping this pair see past aesthetics. Once Vanessa and Troy buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that for them is the biggest disaster!

programme.title: Food is Love with Chef Lasse Sorensen

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Touting the practicality of gondola travel, Joey explores the canals of Venice and discovers the oldest coffee shop in Europe. The trail to classic Italian espresso leads from Illy Coffee near the high-fashion metropolis of Trieste to the medieval town of Scarperia where espresso machines are manufactured. Florence boasts a famous barista who prepares a masterful farewell espresso.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: An exploration of Paris's distinctive cafe culture reveals a renaissance of coffee-inspired cuisine, pastries, and spirits. programme.title: Foodie Guide to Québec City

programme.title: Taste of France
programme.desc: In this program we'll meet two Michelin star chef, Alexandre Mazzia at his highly acclaimed restaurant in Marseilles. His daily challenge is not lack of inspiration, but to filter the massive influx of ideas that runs through his head. He's meticulous and precise in his food crafting, which covers both an excellent taste and a mesmerizing beauty on the plate. We'll also get the exclusive opportunity to meet with a world-famous vegetable producer that supplies most of the three-star Michelin chefs all over France.

programme.title: Taste of France
programme.desc: Today we'll visit the wonderful city of Paris and the restaurant of Eric Trochon - Solstice - an informal yet elegant restaurant awarded with a Michelin star. We'll get to know about Trochons' passion for ingredients, such as radishes, their pairing with excellent natural wines and the importance of sauce in the French cuisine. We'll also learn how to make one of his tasty and impeccably crafted dishes!

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen

programme.title: Wildest Places S01 E04
programme.desc: There are 25,000 islands in the vast Pacific Ocean. From palm-lined pristine white beaches to cold rocky outcrops, each one fosters its own ecology with unique rules and behaviours.

programme.title: Wildest Places S02 E01
programme.desc: Hundreds of millions of years of volcanic activity, isolation and powerful currents have shaped Antarctica and its surrounding islands into varied and fascinating terrains.

programme.title: Wildest Places S02 E02
programme.desc: Every animal in Antarctica answers the call of the seasons, and the continent itself is vastly different in Summer and Winter.

programme.title: Wildest Places S02 E03
programme.desc: Antarctica was once the centre of the ancient southern supercontinent, Gondwana. Traces of these connections remain throughout the southern hemisphere today: in plants and marine species with similarities that have long-ago changed and adapted to the environment around them.

programme.title: Wildest Places S02 E04
programme.desc: When it's time to haul ashore for breeding, mating and raising young, marine mammals return from the Antarctic Peninsula to island beaches in the middle of the South Atlantic oceans.

programme.title: Wildest Places S03 E01
programme.desc: Australia's vast interior is dry: nearly a fifth is classified as desert. With little rainfall and temperatures soaring above 50 degrees Celsius, it's an unrelenting habitat. But these arid areas are also surprisingly varied, and can be breathtakingly spectacular.

programme.title: Wildest Places S03 E02
programme.desc: Some of the world's most ancient and ecologically diverse rainforests are in Australia: from the oldest tropical rainforest on earth, North Queensland's Daintree, to the stunning central highlands of Tasmania in the far south.

programme.title: Tactical Planning
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it. Then, Sonia and Matt discover their target van is being used in an investigation of highly toxic material. And, Matt poses as a valet to retrieve a car from an irate diner and his befuddled date.

programme.title: Four Wheel Surprise
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: You Again?
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou get the shock a lifetime when they repossess a car from an irate doctor whom they know all too well from an earlier incident. This time he's twice as angry, and he's dead-set against giving up his car again. Then, Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah go undercover as college students to extract an extremely expensive bicycle from an extremely irate athlete. And finally, Lou and Froy head to church to repossess a van from a minister with a terrible problem.

programme.title: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy transform their search for a small dirt bike into a quasi-reality show, getting a group of young smart-asses trapped into their own web. Then, Sonia and Matt head to the business district for a different sort of quarry - a high-end luxury tanning bed owned by a less-than-sympathetic German. And finally, Lou and Matt set up a high stakes sting operation to bust a shady tow-truck driver, but will their best-laid plans go up in smoke?

programme.title: The Dune Buggy
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: Repo Outside the Box
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia attempt to repossess a car from a group of cleaver-wielding short-order cooks with a taste for violence. Then, it's trouble in paradise as Matt and Froy take on the task of reclaiming a beach-scene-on-wheels filled with irate models. And finally, Sonia and Matt find themselves outmatched by a well-armed street gang and its charismatic leader.

programme.title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia head out to the farm to repossess a truck from an entitled equestrian who would rather die than let the repo team get their hands on what's in the back. Then, Lou and Sonia stumble into the middle of a prolonged business dispute between a flower lady and her displeased client. And finally, Sonia and Froy hit the links to reclaim a high-end Rolls Royce golf cart from a snob who thinks he's too good to pay his bills.

programme.title: Involuntary Voluntary
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Monster of a Problem
programme.desc: Lyndah and Matt confront a confused debtor who is as quick with his questions as he is with his knife. Then, Lou and Lyndah interrupt a seaside party to repo a motorboat away from a gaggle of misguided youths. And, Lou, Froy, and Sonia head to the dirt track to repossess a car from an event promoter. They seem to be able to reason with him, but his monster truck-driving brother with no respect for human life may prove to be a problem.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: John Stamos, BAM Bus, Drew's News:Philadelphia Edition, Hometown Spirit Denver
programme.desc: John Stamos on his new podcast, “The Grand Scheme: Snatching Sinatra.” Plus, meet the three women, who after finding out they all had the same cheating boyfriend, dumped him, bought a school bus naming it after their initials and hit the road for a once in a lifetime road trip across the US. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are taking their desk on the road and serving you the news sunny-side up from Philadelphia. Drew is celebrating hometown pride all week long with viewers sharing tours of what makes their town so special and unique including today's hometown spirit tour of Denver.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's Crew To The Rescue Hour
programme.desc: Drew's Crew to the Rescue Hour: Drew's assembled her Drew's Crew team of experts to help solve viewers' dilemmas on everything from fashion to food to relationships and remodeling. Celebrity Interior Designer Mikel Welch is surprising one deserving viewer who lost her home office in Hurricane Ida with a brand-new workspace. Then, hair stylist extraordinaire Chris Appleton helps one mother of three spruce up her look before heading back to the office. Plus, renowned dating coach Damona Hoffman is on-site to help one couple reignite their marriage after recently becoming empty nesters, and “Rebel Homemaker” co-author Pilar Valdes is whipping up a yummy and healthy dish to help curb those carb cravings.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Regina Hall, Drew's News, In a Minute Raffle
programme.desc: "Honk for Jesus" star Regina Hall joins Drew to chat. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Drew and Regina surprise one lucky audience member with a big prize!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Molly Shannon, David Spade, Dana Carvey, Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Actress Molly Shannon stops by to chat about her new memoir “Hello Molly!: A Memoir.” Then, Winnie Harlow is sharing all the details on her new beauty line. Plus, “Fly on the Wall” Podcast hosts David Spade and Dana Carvey join Drew and Ross Mathews at th

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: “Pen15” Maya Erskine & Anna Konkle, Drew's News with Danny Pellegrino, Chef Pilar Valdes
programme.desc: Drew channels her inner Josie Geller to interview middle school BFFs and stars of “Pen15” Maya Erskine and Anna Konkle. Plus, Drew and Chef Pilar Valdes are in the kitchen whipping up Drew's Grilled Cheese on the Griddle and Pilar's Tomato Soup. programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.desc: An exploration and meditation on how to nurture, sustain and improve all kinds of relationships in your life. 1) 4 things all great listeners know | TED-Ed 2) Why you should talk to strangers | Kio Stark 3) What makes a friendship last? | Mona Chalabi 4) Do kids think of sperm donors as family? | Veerle Provoost 5) How to co-parent as allies, not adversaries | Ebony Roberts and Shaka Senghor 6) What is love? | Brad Troeger

programme.title: The Business Angle
programme.desc: Insights from the professional world -- from CEOs, entrepreneurs, HR experts, everyday employees and more -- on how to run a successful business and make work life better for everyone. 1) How to build a freelance career that works for you | Shahar Erez 2) 4 steps to hiring fairly -- and supporting criminal justice reform | Nyra Jordan 3) How does work...work? - Peter Bohacek 4) Want to succeed in business? Find a problem to solve | Anthony Tan and Amane Dannouni 5) To support people at work, focus on needs — not identity | Gabrielle Novacek

programme.title: Lead the Way
programme.desc: What makes a great leader? Surprising, nuanced approaches on how to inspire and empower others to do their very best. 1) How vulnerability makes you a better leader | Tracy Young 2) How to embrace emotions at work | Liz Fosslien 3) Do you have what it takes to freelance? | TED-Ed 4) How great leaders take on uncertainty | Anjali Sud and Stephanie Mehta 5) Dignity isn't a privilege. It's a worker's right | Abigail Disney

programme.title: Revolutionary Women!
programme.desc: What happens when purpose and passion overshadow fear? Follow in the steps of these outstanding women who let their ferocity, fortitude and wisdom guide them in living -- and speaking -- their truth. 1) We should all be feminists | Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie 2) Why do ambitious women have flat heads? | Dame Stephanie Shirley 3) The powerful women on the front lines of climate action | Farwiza Farhan 4) The fight for the right to vote in the United States | Nicki Beaman Griffin

programme.title: Secrets of the Wild
programme.desc: Be inspired to go out and rediscover the wonders of the natural world -- and get a deeper understanding of where (and why) the wild things grow. 1) Can we learn to talk to sperm whales? | David Gruber 2) The amazing brains and morphing skin of octopuses and other cephalopods | Roger Hanlon 3) A brief tour of the last 4 billion years (dinosaurs not included) | Lauren Sallan 4) Nature's fortress: How cacti keep water in and predators out | Lucas C. Majure 5) The power of venom -- and how it could one day save your life | Mandë Holford 6) How butterflies self-medicate | Jaap de Roode 7) The loathsome, lethal mosquito - Rose Eveleth

programme.title: Psych Out
programme.desc: What makes you, well, you? (Level 1) | Jeff Leek and Lucy McGowan
